title: elymus bowdenii
intro: Elymus bowdenii, also known as Bowden's wheat grass, is a type of grass native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus bowdenii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Elymus bowdenii typically involve making teas or infusions from the dried leaves, or using it in capsule or powder form.
